name: backend-lessons
description: Teaching app for the Backend Assessment lessons
comment: No dependencies of its own on purpose. client/ and server/ each hold theirs, so opening either one alone looks exactly like the project this course is assessed against.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,APP -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev:offline: concurrently -n API,APP -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run start:offline" "npm --prefix client run dev"
